Day advanced to 2026-03-08.
6,462 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-07 -> 2026-03-08)

- "Who will Sri Lanka name as its new men's cricket coach by March 2026?" → Gary Kirsten
- "Which country will Australia's prime minister say will receive missiles from Australia by March 10, 2026?" → United Arab Emirates
- "Which airline will suspend its 2026 financial outlook by mid-March 2026 because of uncertainty over fuel costs linked to the Iran conflict?" → Air New Zealand
- "Which Ukrainian region will a Ukrainian major-general say has been almost entirely retaken during a counteroffensive by March 11, 2026?" → Dnipropetrovsk

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (252 resolved, 78 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
